proposal1.heroHeadline: Adonis is burning $50,000 a year on manually crafted proposals. Here's where it leaks.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually written proposals waste time better spent on strategic growth. Automate them in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Adonis faces significant ongoing losses from inefficient proposal processes.

problems.title: Lost Hours
problems.description: Every hour spent writing a proposal is an hour not spent acquiring new clients. Adonis loses up to 500 hours yearly on this.

problems.title: Fragmented Efforts
problems.description: Fragmentation in proposal creation causes inconsistency. This results in missed opportunities to convert leads, costing Adonis potential revenue.

problems.title: Unclear Ownership
problems.description: Without clear ownership, proposals get delayed. Each delay can cost Adonis a client, leading to an estimate of $10,000 in lost deals annually.

problems.title: Reactive Decisions
problems.description: Decisions made under pressure often lead to errors. Mistakes in proposals can cost Adonis up to $5,000 in missed deal opportunities per year.

problems.title: Tool Overload
problems.description: Using multiple tools for proposals leads to inefficiency. This inefficiency translates into $15,000 of wasted resources annually.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent proposals weaken brand image. This inconsistency potentially costs Adonis several high-value B2B contracts annually.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all these inefficiencies with a seamless solution.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. Our system completes them in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes lead to inconsistent messaging. Our system ensures every proposal aligns with Adonis's brand.

solutions.title: Clear Ownership
solutions.description: Unclear roles delay proposal completion. Our system assigns and tracks ownership automatically.

solutions.title: Integrated Tools
solutions.description: Multiple tools create chaos. Our system integrates all necessary tools into one cohesive platform.

solutions.title: Proactive Decisions
solutions.description: Reactive processes lead to errors. Our system provides data-driven insights for proactive decision making.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Adonis's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Adonis around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Adonis.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Growth with Adonis's Strategic Marketing Solutions.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our tailored strategy focuses on maximizing your revenue streams and enhancing customer engagement through precise marketing tactics.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is facing significant revenue losses due to fragmented marketing efforts.

problems.title: Visitor Conversion Loss
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. This results in an estimated 20% loss in potential sales monthly.

problems.title: Brand Visibility Decline
problems.description: Without a cohesive brand presence, Acme Corp loses market share to competitors. This visibility gap could account for a 15% decline in brand recognition.

problems.title: Inefficient Communication
problems.description: Unclear ownership and broken handoffs result in mismanaged campaigns. This inefficiency can lead to a 25% increase in operational costs.

problems.title: Tool Overload
problems.description: The multiplication of tools leads to fragmented data and increased complexity, costing Acme Corp an estimated 30 hours a month in productivity.

problems.title: Reactive Decision Making
problems.description: Decisions made reactively rather than strategically lead to missed opportunities. This could result in a 10% decrease in potential growth.

problems.title: Customer Engagement Drop
problems.description: Lack of targeted campaigns leads to decreased customer interaction, potentially reducing customer retention by 18%.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions address these issues, transforming them into opportunities for growth.

solutions.title: Targeted Digital Campaigns
solutions.description: Enhance your online presence and convert visitors into loyal customers. Our campaigns are designed to increase conversion rates and engagement.

solutions.title: Brand Strategy Development
solutions.description: Create a cohesive brand strategy that increases visibility and market share. This helps in establishing a strong market position.

solutions.title: Streamlined Communication Tools
solutions.description: Implement tools that clarify ownership and improve campaign management. This reduces operational inefficiencies and costs.

solutions.title: Data-Driven Decision Making
solutions.description: Utilize data to make informed decisions, turning reactive processes into strategic growth opportunities.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Adonis positions itself as a leader in strategic marketing solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: With years of experience, we deliver effective marketing strategies that drive results.

whyUsCards.title: Results-Driven Approach
whyUsCards.description: Our focus is on measurable outcomes that align with your business goals.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Service
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize clear communication and strong partnerships with our clients.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Our team uses cutting-edge tools and methodologies for optimal performance.

socialProof.label: Increase in brand engagement for clients.
Reduction in marketing costs with our strategies.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team is dedicated to delivering exceptional marketing strategies.

team.name: Derek Buntin
team.bio: Derek leads our strategic initiatives, ensuring each client receives tailored solutions. He is committed to fostering strong client relationships.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Analysis
process.description: We conduct a thorough analysis of your current marketing strategies.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Develop a comprehensive strategy tailored to your needs.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Execute the strategy with precision and expertise.

process.title: Evaluation & Adjustment
process.description: Assess the outcomes and make necessary adjustments.

pricing.description: Ideal for businesses looking to establish a strong online presence.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's discuss how we can transform your business. No commitments required.

lead.company_description:
At Adonis Media, we help SMEs drive revenue growth and achieve measurable business impact. We focus on delivering tangible outcomes, such as reducing customer acquisition costs, accelerating sales velocity, and maximising ROI.

We ensure your digital presence stands out and converts high-value customers, while our digital solutions streamline operations and future-proof your growth.

Ultimately, we become an extension of your team, dedicated to driving results that truly matter for your bottom line.
